# Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card
Exclusive rewards on 'Flipkart Wholesale'
  * 5% CashBack on Flipkart Wholesale Online Spends capped at Rs.2000 per month
  * 5% CashBack on Telecom, Utility, Govt & Tax Payments up to Rs. 250 per month
  * 1% CashBack on all other spends will be capped at 25,000 per month


[Enquire Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfcbank.com/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FLKW#nbb "Enquire Now")
![banner-logo](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/PWS_23226_Flipkart-Business-desk?fmt=webp-alpha)

More benefits than ever before
CashBack Benefits
  * 5% CashBack on Flipkart Wholesale Online Spends, capped at ₹2,000 per month
  * 5% CashBack on Telecom, Utility, Govt & Tax Payments up to Rs. 250 per month
  * 1% CashBack on all other spends will be capped at 25,000 per month


Activation Benefits
  * ₹500 CashBack per transaction on first 3 purchases within 90 days of on-boarding, (Min.txn of ₹2,000 each and spends limited to Flipkart Wholesale online platforms only) 


SmartBuy Benefits
  * Exclusive SmartBuy Business portal for all Business cardholders. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/) to know more.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card#benefits "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
Lifestyle Benefits
  * 5% CashBack on Telecom, Utility, Govt and Tax Payments up to ₹250 per month
  * 1% CashBack on all other spends will be capped at 25,000 per month
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver with minimum transaction of ₹400 & maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle 


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card "View More")
![Flipkart Wholesale Credir Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Transactions Benefits
  * SmartPay is an automatic payment facility available on your Credit Card to pay your utility bills. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/offer_details/save-more-automatic-payments-on-debitcredit-card/15538/Zmiolms%3D) to know more
  * Convert big spends into EMI after purchase with Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card.
  * Get renewal membership fee waived off by spending ₹3,00,000 and above in the previous year.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Enjoy zero liability on fraudulent transactions made on your Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card on reporting card loss immediately to our 24x7 call centre.
  * Get up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the purchase date, subject to timely charge submission by the merchant.
  * Revolving credit available at a nominal interest rate. Refer to the Fees and Charges section for details.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card "View More")
![Flipkart Wholesale Credir Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible for this card?
For Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian national
  * **Age:** Minimum: 21 years, Maximum: 65 years
  * **Income:** Annual ITR > ₹6 lakh


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
[ View All  (opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card/eligibility "View All")
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Fees and Charges
Know more about the joining/renewal fees and other charges here.
[Check Now (opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card/fees-and-charges "Check Now")
## How to apply for a Credit Card?
## Apply for a Credit Card online in 3 simple steps:
  * Step 1 - Provide your personal details
  * Step 2 - Select the Credit Card best suited for you
  * Step 3 - Upload your documents and submit


![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## More About The Card
  1. ### Card Reward & Redemption Program
  2. ### Cashback Validity
  3. ### Contactless Payment
  4. ### Smart EMI
  5. ### Zero Cost Card Liability
  6. ### Revolving Credit
  7. ### Card Management & Control
  8. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Reward & Redemption Program 
**Redemption Value:**
  * CashBack accrued per calendar month auto redeemed in successive statements 


**Redemption Limit:**
  * With effect from 1st January 2023,  

    * Rent payment and Education related transactions will not earn reward points. 
    * Reward points earned on Grocery transactions will be capped to 1,000 per month. 
    * Redemption of Travel Reward Points will be capped at 50,000 points per month
  * 1% Fees to be charged on Rental transactions - from the 2nd rental transaction done every calendar month
  * 1% Mark-Up charges to be applied on all DCC transactions


TandC (w.e.f 31st Oct 2023)
  * 1% CashBack on all other spends will be capped at 25,000 per month
  * Only the mentioned categories basis the Merchant IDs / Terminal IDs in the list shared by Flipkart Wholesale Partner shall be applicable for relevant cashbacks. The same shall be updated and maintained periodically as obtained from Partner's end.


![Card Reward & Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Cashback Validity 
  * Unredeemed Reward Points will expire/lapse after 2 years of accumulation 


![Cashback Validity](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.  
(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.) 


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Smart EMI 
  * Option to convert big spends into EMI after purchase available on Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card. ([Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi) to know more) 


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Zero Cost Card Liability 
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


![Zero Cost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
  * Available at a nominate interest rate. (Check Fees and Charges section for more details)


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Management & Control 
**MyCards** , a mobile-based service platform for all credit card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions, etc.
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


![Welcome Renwal Bonus](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![MITC](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What are the documents required to apply for a Flipkart Wholesale Card
You will need identity proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card), address proof (latest utility bill, passport), and income proof (latest salary slips for salaried individuals, income tax returns for self-employed individuals) to **apply for Flipkart Wholesale Credit Card Online**.
###  How to apply for the Flipkart Wholesale Credit Card? 
To **apply for Flipkart Wholesale Credit Card** , follow these steps: 
**Existing HDFC Bank Account holders:**
  * Download the application form 
  * Fill in your details and drop it off at your local HDFC Bank branch 
  * We'll handle the rest and send the card to your mailing address. 


**Non-HDFC Bank Account holders:**
  * Download the Account Opening form 
  * Fill it, including the**Flipkart Wholesale Credit Card** application 
  * Submit it to your nearest HDFC Bank branch, and we'll assist with the rest 


###  What are the benefits of Flipkart Wholesale Credit Card?
- Utility bill payments made easy with SmartPay.
- Interest-free credit period up to 50 days.
- Fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India.
###  What is the Flipkart Wholesale Card?
The**Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card** is a co-branded Credit Card that offers attractive cashback rewards, exclusive discounts on Flipkart Wholesale online platforms, utility bill payments, interest-free credit period, fuel surcharge waiver, and various other benefits.
###  Does the Flipkart Wholesale Card have lounge access? 
Yes, the **Flipkart Wholesale Credit Card** provides unlimited airport lounge access to 1000 plus lounges in India for both primary and add-on card members. Enjoy a comfortable and luxurious travel experience.   

###  What is the credit limit of Flipkart Wholesale Card?
The credit limit on your **Flipkart Wholesale HDFC Bank Credit Card** will be determined based on various factors such as your income, credit history, and existing relationship with the bank. The bank will inform you of your approved credit limit after your application is processed.
## Frequently Asked Questions
[View More (opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/flipkart-wholesale-credit-card/FAQ-flipkart-wholesale-card-03jan2025.pdf "View More")
